channel.title: Farhan Kurnia Pratama | Blog
channel.description: The official blog website of Farhan Kurnia Pratama | Email: contact@fkp.my.id

item.title: Building a Wayland Desktop Environment with Rust and GTK4
item.description: Notes on my journey building a custom DE using the Rust, GTK-rs, and libadwaita ecosystem.
item.content:encoded:
Exploring the creation of a custom Desktop Environment (DE) running on the Wayland protocol is a very exciting challenge.

I really love the interface of GNOME’s default applications, but for the desktop environment itself, I want something tailored specifically to my own workflow. Using Rust combined with GTK-rs and libadwaita provides a combination of performance, memory safety, and a modern interface look.

Why Rust?

Rust’s built-in memory safety is crucial when dealing with low-level components like a Wayland compositor. We can avoid many of the bugs that frequently occur in C/C++.

Here is an example of a simple GTK4 application initialization in Rust:

```rust use gtk::prelude::*; use gtk::{Application, ApplicationWindow};

fn main() { let app = Application::builder() .application_id(“id.my.fkp.wayland_de”) .build();

app.connect_activate(|app| {
    let window = ApplicationWindow::builder()
        .application(app)
        .title("My Custom DE")
        .default_width(800)
        .default_height(600)
        .build();
    window.present();
});

app.run();

}
item.dc:creator: Farhan Kurnia Pratama

item.title: AI-Based Business Ideas with Massive Scale Potential
item.description: Exploring several B2B business models using AI that can generate high and stable income.
item.content:encoded:
The utilization of artificial intelligence (AI) is no longer just a trend, but rather a fundamental infrastructure for modern business efficiency. Building SaaS (Software as a Service) products that integrate AI has tremendous scalability potential.

Here are a few business architectures I am currently researching:

  1. B2B Financial Report Automation Using LLMs to extract and standardize data from thousands of irregular invoices or receipts into an audit-ready format.

  2. Domain-Specific Coding Assistant Unlike general coding assistants, this AI is trained on an enterprise’s internal codebase repositories so it understands their internal architecture and security standards.

The key to these ideas is focusing on solving specific, high-ticket pain points for companies, rather than just wrapping a ChatGPT prompt into a regular application.
item.dc:creator: Farhan Kurnia Pratama
